questionHtml: Outline the reason that the curve for fetal hemoglobin is to the left of normal adult hemoglobin.
markschemeHtml:
1. fetal hemoglobin has a higher affinity for oxygen then normal hemoglobin;
  2. oxygen will pass from normal/maternal/mother’s hemoglobin to fetal hemoglobin (in the placenta);

meta.title: Outline the reason that the curve for fetal hemoglobin is to the left of normal adult hemoglobin.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.1.13. Oxygen dissociation curves as a means of representing the affinity of haemoglobin for oxygen at different oxygen concentrations
